title: Dutchie Dispensary Menu Scraper
description:
Extract complete product menus from any Dutchie.com-powered dispensary. Paste one or more dispensary URLs below and click Run.

Pricing: $1.50 per 1,000 product variants (SKUs) extracted.

dispensaryUrls.title: Dispensary URLs
dispensaryUrls.description: One or more Dutchie dispensary URLs to scrape. Example: https://dutchie.com/dispensary/your-store-name
dispensaryUrls.sectionDescription: Paste the full Dutchie URL for each dispensary you want to scrape.

maxItems.title: Max Products per Store
maxItems.description: Limit the number of products extracted per dispensary. Set to 0 for unlimited (full menu). Use a small number (e.g. 10) to preview results before a full run.
maxItems.sectionDescription: Control how much data is extracted.

useProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useProxy.description: Enable Apify proxy for IP rotation. Recommended if you encounter 403 errors or are scraping many stores in bulk.
useProxy.sectionDescription: Proxy and network configuration. Most users can leave these at their defaults.

proxyGroup.title: Proxy Group
proxyGroup.description: Which Apify proxy group to use when proxy is enabled.
